tweets.author: TheShortBear
tweets.text:
As long as the majority disagrees with me, there is opportunity to make profitable trades.

The day everyone agrees with me is the day I’ll join them in their despair.

By design, I only win when most are wrong.

Life is full of opportunity for those willing to challenge common

tweets.author: TheShortBear
tweets.text:
This market is tough because all moves are happening on major asset classes which are dragging the rest with major beta. 

Trends break quick on news and reverse back just as quick making risk hard to calculate and price action less organic. 

Major moves are happening either

tweets.author: TheShortBear
tweets.text:
@TedHZhang The contrarian take doesnt mean you play mean-reversion. 

it means having a different view over the future where things can go much further. 

See NVDA for example with a view that AI could become much bigger than anticipated and NVDA being the bottleneck. 

Its a contrarian

Retail landgrab model in China is next level. Also operational https://t.co/GLtSVTEeGT

tweets.author: jukan05
tweets.text:
“Meta acquires Moltbook.”

Zuckerberg really does buy anything that can be bought with money.

What surprised me the moment I saw the news was that Meta didn’t make a copycat of Moltbook — it acquired Moltbook itself. Do they think that would be cheaper?
